# Spec Tasks

- [ ] 1. Implement full-text thought search
  - [ ] 1.1 Write integration tests for `GET /api/thoughts/search` (match by text, match by tag, empty results, missing q param returns 400)

- [ ] 2. Implement data export endpoint
  - [ ] 2.1 Write integration tests for `GET /api/export?format=csv` (correct headers, valid CSV content) and `GET /api/export?format=json` (valid JSON array)

  - [ ] 2.5 Verify all export integration tests pass

- [ ] 3. Implement cognitive bias detection
  - [ ] 3.1 Write unit tests for `CognitiveBiasDetector`: catastrophizing pattern triggers on ≥ 3 matching thoughts, overgeneralizing pattern triggers independently, below-threshold produces no insights
  - [ ] 3.2 Create `ICognitiveBiasDetector` interface
  - [ ] 3.3 Add bias pattern keyword lists to `appsettings.json` under `CognitiveBiasDetection:Patterns`
  - [ ] 3.4 Implement `CognitiveBiasDetector` reading patterns from `IConfiguration`
  - [ ] 3.5 Register `CognitiveBiasDetector` as singleton; integrate into `InsightService` alongside existing analyzers
  - [ ] 3.6 Verify all cognitive bias unit tests pass

- [ ] 4. Implement cross-domain correlation insights
  - [ ] 4.1 Write unit tests for `CrossCorrelationAnalyzer`: tag co-occurrence rate > 60% generates insight, time-windowed stress/trading correlation detected, below-threshold scenarios produce no insights
  - [ ] 4.2 Create `ICrossCorrelationAnalyzer` interface
  - [ ] 4.3 Implement `CrossCorrelationAnalyzer` with co-occurrence rate computation and 2-hour time-window correlation
  - [ ] 4.4 Register `CrossCorrelationAnalyzer` as singleton; integrate into `InsightService`
  - [ ] 4.5 Verify all correlation unit tests pass

- [ ] 5. Implement personalized recommendations service
  - [ ] 5.1 Write unit tests for `RecommendationService`: evening stress pattern triggers correct recommendation, trading-heavy focus triggers correct recommendation, no patterns = no recommendations
  - [ ] 5.2 Create `IRecommendationService` interface
  - [ ] 5.3 Implement `RecommendationService` with template-based recommendations driven by insight categories and weekly reflection data

  - [ ] 5.5 Verify all recommendation unit tests pass

- [ ] 6. Implement embedding-based similarity detection

  - [ ] 6.6 Add `AI:EmbeddingsEnabled` and `AI:EmbeddingsApiKey` to `appsettings.json`; register correct service in `Program.cs`
